Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, Samantha Hathaway.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jeremy Pasternak, Esq. appeared with petitioner Elizabeth Osmer, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Samantha Hathaway, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Osmer Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on April 11, 2016.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $9,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,350.00.
Costs - $1,152.80.

The net balance of $6,497.20 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2454 Noriega Street, San Francisco, CA 94122. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.
